name: quick-prd
description: SAM Quick PRD Workflow - Quill drafts a valid PRD in one pass, making explicit assumptions where the user is silent.

name: scope
description: SAM Scope Workflow - Turns an idea, rough notes, or nothing at all into a PRD that plan can consume.

name: plan
description: SAM Planning Workflow - Transforms a PRD into validated epics and stories. Does not implement code.

name: build-tdd
description: SAM Build-TDD Workflow - Implements a single user story using RED-GREEN-REFACTOR with conditional UI/CSS/A11y/Security review.

name: plan-n-build
description: SAM end-to-end composer - runs plan, then tdd for every story, then comprehensive docs.

name: extend
description: SAM Extend Workflow - Plan additive changes on top of an existing app. Reads existing sdocs/, never wipes; emits new contracts, stories, and regression integration without modifying done work.

name: replan
description: SAM Replan Workflow - Handle requirement changes mid-build by diffing a revised PRD against the current state and surgically updating affected artifacts.
